info.title: Unhandled exception. System.ArgumentException: IDX12709: CanReadToken() returned false. JWT is not well formed: 'System.String'.
info.description:
The token needs to be in JWS or JWE Compact Serialization Format. (JWS): 'EncodedHeader.EndcodedPayload.EncodedSignature'. (JWE): 'EncodedProtectedHeader.EncodedEncryptedKey.EncodedInitializationVector.EncodedCiphertext.EncodedAuthenticationTag'.
at System.IdentityModel.Tokens.Jwt.JwtSecurityTokenHandler.ReadJwtToken(String token)
at System.IdentityModel.Tokens.Jwt.JwtSecurityTokenHandler.ReadToken(String token)
at BearerDecoder.Program.Decode(String token) in /home/runner/work/dotnet-jwt-decoder/dotnet-jwt-decoder/src/JwtDecoder/Program.cs:line 11
at BearerDecoder.Program.Main(String[] args) in /home/runner/work/dotnet-jwt-decoder/dotnet-jwt-decoder/src/JwtDecoder/Program.cs:line 18
